# EVOLA

> EVOLA rents electric bikes and batteries in Wroclaw, Poland, converts standard bicycles into electric ones, repairs and reconditions e-bike batteries, and sells e-bike batteries. Rental periods start at 1 week with bike service included twice a week.

EVOLA offers two e-bike models for weekly rental (full suspension and hardtail, both with 30Ah batteries), standalone battery rentals (22–35Ah, 50–130 zl/week), battery sales (22–35Ah, 1200–2000 PLN, 12-month warranty), custom e-bike conversion/build services from 1200 zl, battery repair and reconditioning, and ready-made e-bike kits (250W–3000W). The site is available in three languages: Russian at `/` (default), English at `/en`, and Polish at `/pl`.

## Site (Russian, default)
- [Главная — Аренда электровелосипедов](https://evola-bikes.com/): Hero, pricing, comparison, benefits, conversion, FAQ.
- [Батареи — аренда и продажа](https://evola-bikes.com/batteries): Battery rental (50–130 zł/week) and purchase (1200–2000 PLN) for 22/25/30/35Ah. Service included. 12-month warranty on purchase. FAQ.
- [Конверсия — электровелосипед под заказ](https://evola-bikes.com/conversion): Bike-to-electric conversion from 1200 zł, custom builds, battery repair and reconditioning, custom battery assembly. Gallery, tech specs, process, FAQ.

## Site (English)
- [Home — Electric bike rental](https://evola-bikes.com/en): Hero, pricing, comparison, benefits, conversion, FAQ.
- [Batteries — rent and buy](https://evola-bikes.com/en/batteries): Battery rental (50–130 zl/week) and purchase (1200–2000 PLN) for 22/25/30/35Ah. Service included. 12-month warranty on purchase. FAQ.
- [Conversion — custom e-bike](https://evola-bikes.com/en/conversion): Bike-to-electric conversion from 1200 zł, custom builds, battery repair and reconditioning, custom battery assembly. Gallery, tech specs, process, FAQ.

## Site (Polish)
- [Strona główna — Wynajem rowerów elektrycznych](https://evola-bikes.com/pl): Hero, pricing, comparison, benefits, conversion, FAQ.
- [Baterie — wynajem i zakup](https://evola-bikes.com/pl/batteries): Wynajem baterii (50–130 zł/tydz.) i zakup (1200–2000 PLN) dla 22/25/30/35Ah. Serwis w cenie. Gwarancja 12 miesięcy przy zakupie. FAQ.
- [Konwersja — rower elektryczny na zamówienie](https://evola-bikes.com/pl/conversion): Konwersja roweru na elektryczny od 1200 zł, budowa na zamówienie, naprawa i regeneracja baterii ebike, budowa akumulatorów. Galeria, dane techniczne, proces, FAQ.
